description.content: Returns an array of the most emailed articles on NYTimes.com for specified period of time (1 day, 7 days, or 30 days).

response.name: An array of articles.
Unauthorized request.  Make sure api-key is set.
Too many requests.  You reached your per minute or per day rate limit.

item.name: Most shared articles on NYTimes.com of specified share type.

request.name: Most shared articles on NYTimes.com of specified share type.

description.content: Returns an array of the most shared articles by share type on NYTimes.com for specified period of time (1 day, 7 days, or 30 days).

response.name: An array of articles.
Unauthorized request.  Make sure api-key is set.
Too many requests.  You reached your per minute or per day rate limit.

description.content: Returns an array of the most viewed articles on NYTimes.com for specified period of time (1 day, 7 days, or 30 days).

response.name: An array of articles.
Unauthorized request.  Make sure api-key is set.
Too many requests.  You reached your per minute or per day rate limit.

description.content: (Required) Share type: email, facebook, or twitter.

Provides services for getting the most popular articles on NYTimes.com based on emails, shares, or views.

Get most emailed articles for the last day:
```
/emailed/1.json
```

Get most shared articles on Facebook for the last day:
```
/shared/1/facebook.json
```

Get most viewed articles for the last seven days:
```
/viewed/7.json
```

## Example Calls
```
https://api.nytimes.com/svc/mostpopular/v2/emailed/7.json?api-key=yourkey
```

```
https://api.nytimes.com/svc/mostpopular/v2/shared/1/facebook.json?api-key=yourkey
```

```
https://api.nytimes.com/svc/mostpopular/v2/viewed/1.json?api-key=yourkey
```
